item.title: That rock get the girl.
item.description: During a keeper talk at the San Diego Zoo, visitors gather as the otters are brought closer for a better look. One mother waddles up to the glass and proudly shows off her baby, instantly drawing “aww” reactions from the crowd. Moments later, the father joins in, but instead of another baby, he presents a small, smooth rock, holding it like it’s something valuable. He looks around as if expecting the same attention, and the keeper jokes that he’s basically trying to join the moment with his own “show and tell,” since otters sometimes get attached to favorite objects. The baby wins hearts, but the dad’s rock ends up stealing the biggest laugh
item.dc:creator: LunaAtlas

item.title: When was the last time the Mayor of your city showed up to your house?
item.description: Mayor Mamdani is going directly to residents private homes to ensure the landlords properties are safe and up to code for the tenants. The visits are part of regular housing inspections handled by city agencies. These checks focus on safety, maintenance, and whether landlords are meeting legal standards. Issues like mold, broken fixtures, and unsafe structures are part of what inspectors look for. By joining these inspections, Mamdani is putting attention on tenant rights. It also reminds landlords that enforcement is active and visible. For tenants, it signals that complaints and concerns are being taken seriously. https://creators.yahoo.com/lifestyle/story/nyc-mayor-zohran-mamdani-goes-directly-to-tenants-homes-for-an-inspection-and-the-moment-is-resonating-far-beyond-new-york-084251803.html
item.dc:creator: Herebychoice

item.title: Spiders Are Friends
item.description: Every time a new reader, somewhere in the world, comes across our comic and laughs, their face pops up before our inner mind's eye. They become part of the War and Peas World. This world is fueled by actual imagination and is 100% human-made (except for the occasional alien intervention). It's been built through years of joy-filled and gut-wrenching work alike. There are no shortcuts. No schemes. But there is much laughter! We see you chuckle and dance, skipping along your merry day. And honestly? That's what keeps us going. If you'd like to help us keep creating, consider supporting us on Patreon. Your support means we can keep drawing comics instead of getting real jobs. https://www.patreon.com/warandpeas
item.dc:creator: Warandpeasofficial

item.title: GovBrief Today #458
item.description: Donald Trump's prosecutor Jeanine Pirro told the country today she'll appeal the ruling that called her Powell investigation a pressure campaign. Jerome Powell leads the Federal Reserve, the agency that sets the country's interest rates. Trump has spent a year demanding lower rates, and Pirro opened a criminal probe into Powell in January over construction costs on the Fed's new headquarters. A federal judge ruled in April that the investigation was a pressure campaign to force Powell to drop rates or quit. Pirro went on television Sunday and said she's not done. Powell's term as Fed Chair ends in twelve days. The Senate is about to confirm Trump's pick Kevin Warsh to replace him. Powell will stay on the Fed as a regular governor, and Pirro's appeal keeps the criminal case against him alive. Call your senators via Resistbot and 5 Calls and tell them to vote no on Warsh until the Justice Department drops the case against Powell for good. I've emailed 7,243 stories over 458 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your name at govbrief.today and I will. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com More context, clickable links, data, and pictures on the website: https://go.govbrief.today/260503-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/giuliani-critical [2] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-may03 [3] https://go.govbrief.today/fed-pirro [4] https://go.govbrief.today/pirro-whcd [5] https://go.govbrief.today/zoo-threats [6] https://go.govbrief.today/foreign-doctors [7] https://go.govbrief.today/newark-landing [8] https://go.govbrief.today/east-potomac Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Gabital 68: Demand
item.description: Demand is the desire and ability of people to purchase a specific product or service at a given price. It reflects both interest in the item and the financial means to acquire it.
item.dc:creator: GabitalEN

item.title: May the 4th
item.description: Gotta post Mara Jade today mostly to set up for my Sith cosplay this week... For balance. Gonna pull this cosplay back out this year and likely do a new shoot in it, it's still one of my favs I ever custom built!
